text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my lunch break, I look for Mejiro McQueen to
discuss her training schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It seems I can't do it after all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Ahh! Trainer! How long have you been standing
there?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gulp! But still... you s-saw my... terrible dancing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please know I don't usually dance this poorly! I'm
just... unaccustomed to pop music.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, I must live up to expectations
atop the stage as well as on the racecourse. That
is a mark of a true Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No need to worry. I will be dancing like a star in
no time!
choice_data_list: I can help you with your practice if you'd like.

Why don't you start by trying to understand the
song?

Why don't you start by trying to understand the
song?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No need to worry. I will be dancing like a star in
no time!
choice_data_list: I can help you with your practice if you'd like.

Why don't you start by trying to understand the
song?

Why don't you start by trying to understand the
song?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But that look on your face... I can see that nothing I say will sway you. Good grief, you are quite the worrywart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-well then... Um... If I make a fool of myself,
please don't laugh at me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join Mejiro McQueen in her training and help her
master the dance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well... it's true I've been focused solely on the
choreography. Perhaps that's why I'm not getting
it quite right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful for your advice. I shall start by
reading the lyrics of the song!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From there, Mejiro McQueen deepens her
understanding of the song, allowing her to master
her dance with aplomb.
